title: davallia epiphylla
intro: Davallia epiphylla, also known as the Epiphytic Davallia or Davallia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family (Davalliaceae). Traditionally, Davallia epiphylla has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Davallia epiphylla is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
